27.comment: 0 = Meramon, 1 = Tyrannomon, 2 = Garurumon, 3 = Frigimon, 4 = Vademon, 5 = Digitamamon

111.comment: 0 = Haven't talked to, 1 = Talked to, 2 = Can wait

112.name: Biyomon hiding place
112.comment: 0 = top left, 1 = bottom left, 2 = bottom right, 3 = top right
